name: agentdash
description: AgentDashboard — 统一看板系统，管理多设备、多项目中 AI Agent 的协同工作

scripts.dev: pnpm run icons:generate && pnpm run dev:web
scripts.desktop:build: pnpm run icons:generate && pnpm exec tauri build --config crates/agentdash-local-tauri/tauri.conf.json --no-bundle --ci
scripts.desktop:bundle: pnpm run icons:generate && pnpm exec tauri build --config crates/agentdash-local-tauri/tauri.conf.json --bundles nsis --no-sign --ci
scripts.dev:backend: pnpm run kill:backend && cargo run --bin agentdash-server
scripts.frontend:build: pnpm run icons:generate && pnpm --filter app-web build
scripts.shared:check: pnpm --filter @agentdash/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @agentdash/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @agentdash/views typecheck
scripts.desktop:check: pnpm run shared:check && pnpm --filter app-tauri typecheck && cargo check -p agentdash-local-tauri
scripts.backend:clippy: cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings -A clippy::too_many_arguments -A clippy::new_ret_no_self -A clippy::type_complexity -A clippy::collapsible_if -A clippy::collapsible_match -A clippy::redundant_closure -A clippy::map_flatten
scripts.contracts:generate: cargo run -p agentdash-agent-protocol --bin generate_backbone_protocol_ts && cargo run -p agentdash-contracts --bin generate_contracts_ts
scripts.contracts:check: cargo run -p agentdash-agent-protocol --bin generate_backbone_protocol_ts -- --check && cargo run -p agentdash-contracts --bin generate_contracts_ts -- --check
scripts.check: pnpm run backend:check && pnpm run backend:clippy && pnpm run backend:test && pnpm run frontend:check && pnpm run frontend:lint && pnpm run frontend:test && pnpm run e2e:test:critical
